title: WebExtensions Examples
description: Metadata for the example extensions in this repository. Consumed by MDN's build system (rari) to link example extensions from WebExtensions API reference pages.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the example extension does.

javascript_apis.description: WebExtension JavaScript APIs used by the example, e.g. "tabs.query" or "storage.local". May be empty.

name.description: Directory name of the example within the repository; used to build its GitHub link.
